title: Baalvion for Manufacturing
excerpt: Industrial telemetry, operations visibility, and supply-chain integration — turning sensor data into uptime and throughput.

seo.title: Manufacturing & Industrial Technology | Baalvion
seo.description: Baalvion builds industrial platforms: high-scale telemetry, real-time operations dashboards, predictive maintenance, and supply-chain integration.

challenges: High-volume sensor data with no unified view
Unplanned downtime that's discovered too late
solutions: High-throughput telemetry ingestion and time-series storage
Predictive signals to catch failures early

blocks.text: Manufacturing generates enormous volumes of operational data — and historically wastes most of it. Sensors stream readings into isolated systems, problems surface only after they cause downtime, and no one has a unified operational picture. Baalvion turns that noise into decisions, as we did in [a real-time command center for mining operations](/case-studies/mining-operations-command-center).

items: **Data volume:** hundreds of sensors per site, with no single view.
**Downtime:** failures discovered after the fact, not before.
**Disconnection:** operations and supply chain rarely integrated.
**Throughput:** optimising across multiple sites is hard without live data.

blocks.text: We build high-throughput telemetry pipelines feeding real-time command centers, with trend-based alerting that catches developing problems early — the [observability](/news/tech/observability-for-distributed-systems) discipline applied to physical operations. We integrate supply chain and logistics for end-to-end visibility, connecting to capabilities like our [logistics control tower](/case-studies/logistics-control-tower).

Manufacturing engagements typically combine [automation](/services/automation), [cloud solutions](/services/cloud-solutions), and [AI solutions](/services/ai-solutions) for predictive maintenance, plus [enterprise software](/services/enterprise-software) to tie operations together.

Manufacturers gain a single live operational picture across sites, catch equipment issues before they cause downtime, and connect operations to the supply chain — improving uptime and throughput together.

faqs.q: Can you handle our sensor data volume?
faqs.a: Yes — our telemetry pipelines are sized for hundreds of sensors per site across many sites, with second-level latency into live dashboards.
Trend-based anomaly detection over time-series data flags developing equipment issues early, so they can be addressed before causing downtime.

faqs.q: Can you connect operations to our supply chain?
faqs.a: Yes — we integrate operational data with supply-chain and logistics visibility, as in our [logistics control tower](/case-studies/logistics-control-tower).
